example: My purse was stolen and my credit card was in it.
There's a lot of transactions that I did not make.
ja: 取引、トランザクション

example: Immediately freezing your account is the first thing we need to do to block further transactions.
I will now be verifying your identity by asking you a series of security questions.
The system only allows me to block the card if the account number can be verified.
Your online banking credentials were compromised.
Your username and password were changed along with your contact information, meaning your credentials were compromised.
ja: 危険にさらす、妥協する

example: I will now start filing the dispute for you.
We are now entering a higher level of verification.
All of the unauthorized transactions will be submitted for a claim.
The case has been submitted to the fraud department.
I have taken note of the reference number for you if you need to call and ask questions.
ja: 参照番号、リファレンスナンバー

example: The process will take 10 business days before a result could be finalized.
Is your mailing address still the same?
You have the option to link your new card to digital wallets like Google Pay or Apple Pay.
We will be sending you an alert to confirm your email.
Please read the verification code once you get it.
I had the balance transfer from your old account to your new one.
Please check your email and report any suspicious activities.
I will get an online fraud specialist to assist you further.
